sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36821" key="e)capaei/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαπ-ᾰείρω</orth>, <sense id="n36821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry away,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
